title: Trade Turnover
query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(TotalSale) FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) + COALESCE((SELECT SUM(TotalCost) FROM MarketBuy WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS total, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(TotalSale) FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS totalReward

details.text: {totalReward} Cr in sales · {total} Cr total turnover
details.help: Total credits flowing through buy and sell market transactions
